function.name: _app_delete_draft_define
function.description:
Delete the draft version of the specified Define in the current application.

【High-risk Operation】
- This operation is irreversible. You need to ask the user if they need to delete before calling.

scope.description:
Parent scope identifier (Parent Scope Identifier).

- App-level objects: fill in "App"
- Module-level objects: fill in the id of the corresponding ModuleDefine
